title: Print product names from user orders
risk_summary: The PR introduces a nested query in try11.py (line 4) with a nesting depth of 3. The impact analysis predicts 45 queries per request, a projected QPS of 300,000.0, pool utilization of 225,000.0%, and an estimated latency of 6,750 ms. All these values exceed the defined thresholds, resulting in a high-risk assessment for the change.
